movie.title: Scary Movie (2000) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Following on the heels of popular teen-scream horror movies, with uproarious comedy and biting satire. Marlon and Shawn Wayans, Shannon Elizabeth and Carmen Electra pitch in to skewer some of Hollywood’s biggest blockbusters, including Scream, I Know What You Did Last Summer, The Matrix, American Pie and The Blair Witch Project.
